Inspect the signature of a typed function

Source: R/typed_function.R
get_signature.Rd

Returns the argument specs, return spec, and original formals attached by typed_function(). Returns NULL for plain functions.

Usage

get_signature(fn)

Arguments

fn

A typed function.

Value

Named list with args, return, and formals, or NULL.

See also

Other typed functions: as_typed(), infer_specs(), is_typed(), signature, typed_function(), typed_method(), validate_call(), with_signature()

Examples

f <- typed_function(
  function(x, y) x + y,
  arg_specs = c(x = "numeric", y = "numeric"),
  return_spec = "numeric"
)
get_signature(f)
#> $args
#>         x         y 
#> "numeric" "numeric" 
#> 
#> $return
#> [1] "numeric"
#> 
#> $formals
#> $formals$x
#> 
#> 
#> $formals$y
#> 
#> 
#>
